name: sbstck-dl
short_desc: Substack CLI downloader (individual posts and full archive; supports paid-subscription cookies).

name: Substack2Markdown
short_desc: Converts Substack publications to Markdown/HTML with a navigable index.

name: tlosint-live
short_desc: Trace Labs Kali-based OSINT VM with dozens of preinstalled tools.

name: CSI Linux
short_desc: Ubuntu-based forensic/OSINT distribution organized by workflow.

name: Buscador
short_desc: Michael Bazzell's OSINT distro focused on people investigations (discontinued).
risk_notes: Discontinued by the author.

name: spiderfoot
short_desc: Automated reconnaissance engine with 200+ modules; web UI + CLI.

name: osint_toolkit
short_desc: Analyst dashboard (FastAPI+React) for IOC triage (IP, domain, hash, email).

name: recon-ng
short_desc: Modular framework with a Metasploit-style interactive console for OSINT.

name: OSINT-SAN
short_desc: Aggregator framework (deanon, IP geo, networks); uneven quality, broken parts.
risk_notes: Russian-origin; modules depend on defunct services. Redundant - superseded by spiderfoot/recon-ng.

name: gOSINT
short_desc: Go OSINT: email/handle collection and Pastebin monitoring. Obsolete.
risk_notes: Unmaintained; obsolete modules. Redundant - superseded by spiderfoot/recon-ng.

name: D4rk_Intel
short_desc: Small collection of investigative scripts; limited scope.
risk_notes: Redundant - superseded by full frameworks.

name: OSINT-Framework
short_desc: osintframework.com link tree (resource directory, not executable).
risk_notes: Check that links are still live.

name: maigret
short_desc: Username enumeration across thousands of sites with profile-metadata extraction.
risk_notes: People enumeration: mind GDPR.

name: social-analyzer
short_desc: Searches profiles by name/username across 1000+ sites with match scoring and an API.
risk_notes: People enumeration: mind GDPR.

name: holehe
short_desc: Checks whether an email has an account on 120+ services without alerting the owner.

name: GHunt
short_desc: Google-ecosystem OSINT from an email/GAIA ID (reviews, photos, devices).
risk_notes: Google API changes break modules temporarily.

name: PhoneInfoga
short_desc: Phone-number OSINT: carrier, country, line type and Internet presence.

name: GhostTrack
short_desc: Simple CLI for IP/phone/username lookup; educational and limited.
risk_notes: Redundant - superseded by maigret + PhoneInfoga.

name: h8mail
short_desc: Email breach search integrating multiple APIs (HIBP, Snusbase...).
risk_notes: Handling leaked credentials: secure storage and a legal basis.

name: HaveIBeenPwned
short_desc: Service to check email/password exposure in known breaches.
api_services: HIBP API key (email de pago; password gratis)

name: Dehashed
short_desc: Commercial breach database with multi-field search.
risk_notes: Paid service; sensitive credential handling.

name: theHarvester
short_desc: Classic collection of emails, hosts and subdomains from a domain.

name: amass
short_desc: Subdomain discovery (passive + active) with an infrastructure graph. OWASP.

name: subfinder
short_desc: Fast subdomain discovery using passive sources only.

name: Shodan CLI
short_desc: CLI for the search engine of Internet-exposed devices (ports, banners, certs).

name: Censys CLI
short_desc: CLI for the search engine focused on TLS certificates and HTTPS services.

name: exiftool
short_desc: Read/write metadata across hundreds of formats (EXIF, GPS, author, software).

name: metagoofil
short_desc: Extracts metadata from a domain's public documents (authors, paths, software).

name: FOCA
short_desc: GUI document-metadata analysis (ElevenPaths). Windows only.
risk_notes: Windows only.

name: Telepathy-Community
short_desc: Telegram OSINT toolkit (message archiving, members, channel analysis).
risk_notes: Telegram rate limits; members' personal data.

name: Telegram-OSINT
short_desc: Lightweight utilities/scripts for Telegram lookup and scraping.

name: matkap
short_desc: Hunts malicious Telegram bots: dumps traffic/messages from a bot token.
risk_notes: Offensive niche; requires a bot token to investigate.

name: Osintgram
short_desc: Instagram OSINT (followers, emails, locations). Fragile to IG changes.
risk_notes: Legacy/broken since 2022-23 (Instagram endpoint changes). Prefer Instaloader.

name: Instaloader
short_desc: Stable downloader of Instagram profiles/posts/stories with metadata.
risk_notes: Scraping subject to Instagram ToS.

name: snscrape
short_desc: Social-network scraper (Twitter/X, Reddit, Mastodon...) without an official API.
risk_notes: Largely dead for Twitter/X as of 2026; minimal maintenance. Still works for Reddit/Mastodon. Use official X API or a commercial scraper for X.

name: PimEyes
short_desc: Commercial facial search: finds other photos of a person across the Internet.
risk_notes: Serious ethical/legal implications; regulated or banned in some jurisdictions.

name: Yandex Images
short_desc: The best free reverse image search, strong on faces and location.

name: GeoSpy
short_desc: AI geolocation estimate of photos from visual content.
risk_notes: Variable accuracy; not for use as definitive proof.

name: SunCalc
short_desc: Solar position for chronolocation via shadow analysis.

name: InsightFace
short_desc: Open-source facial-recognition library (ArcFace, RetinaFace).
risk_notes: Controlled verification only, not mass surveillance; requires a GPU.

name: DeepFace
short_desc: Python wrapper unifying facial-recognition models under a simple API.
risk_notes: Controlled verification only, not mass surveillance.

name: waybackurls
short_desc: Extracts all of a domain's historical URLs indexed by the Wayback Machine.

name: gau
short_desc: Like waybackurls but queries Wayback + Common Crawl + OTX.

name: waybackpy
short_desc: Python library for the Wayback Machine API (snapshots by date).

name: Maltego CE
short_desc: Reference platform for entity graph analysis with transforms.
risk_notes: CE is limited; commercial transforms are paid.

name: Gephi
short_desc: Free network/graph visualization and analysis software (metrics, communities).

name: awesome-osint
short_desc: The reference curated list of OSINT tools and resources (Markdown).

name: Awesome-Telegram-OSINT
short_desc: Curated list of Telegram-specific OSINT resources.

name: Open-source-tools-for-CTI
short_desc: List of open-source Cyber Threat Intelligence tools.

name: the-art-of-pivoting
short_desc: Methodological material on pivoting in OSINT investigations.

name: Meilisearch
short_desc: Full-text search engine to index and query tool outputs.

name: Copernicus Browser
short_desc: Free official browser for ESA Sentinel/Copernicus data (true-color, NDVI, SAR, time series).

name: Sentinel Hub
short_desc: Web + API access to Sentinel/Landsat/commercial imagery with custom processing scripts.

name: QGIS
short_desc: Reference open-source GIS to overlay, measure and analyze geospatial layers.

name: Ahmia
short_desc: Search engine indexing .onion services, reachable from the clearnet.
risk_notes: Visit results only via Tor.

name: OnionSearch
short_desc: CLI that scrapes results across multiple dark-web search engines at once.
risk_notes: Use via Tor and an isolated VM.

name: OpenCorporates
short_desc: The largest open database of companies worldwide (officers, filings, cross-jurisdiction links).

name: GLEIF
short_desc: Global index of Legal Entity Identifiers (LEI): authoritative entity IDs and ownership.

name: OCCRP Aleph
short_desc: Searchable archive cross-referencing public records, registries and leaks.

name: Companies House
short_desc: UK company registry with a free API: officers, filings, charges.
risk_notes: UK only.

name: Blockchair
short_desc: Multi-chain block explorer with powerful search and filters (BTC, ETH and more).

name: Etherscan
short_desc: The reference Ethereum/EVM explorer: transactions, tokens, contracts, address labels.

name: Breadcrumbs
short_desc: Visual investigation tool to trace and graph on-chain flows across wallets.

name: WalletExplorer
short_desc: Bitcoin wallet clustering: groups addresses likely controlled by the same owner.

name: ADSBExchange
short_desc: Unfiltered ADS-B aircraft tracking (shows aircraft filtered platforms hide).

name: OpenSky Network
short_desc: Research-grade aircraft-tracking data with a historical API.

name: MarineTraffic
short_desc: The reference AIS platform for vessel positions and history.

name: VesselFinder
short_desc: An AIS vessel-tracking alternative.

name: dump1090
short_desc: Self-hosted SDR decoder to receive ADS-B locally with an RTL-SDR dongle.
risk_notes: Requires SDR hardware.

name: start.me
short_desc: Platform for building curated link dashboards; popular for organizing OSINT tools and sources into shareable boards.
